brief.para: Multi-vector half-precision convert to deinterleaved single-precision

authored.para: This instruction converts each element of the source vector from half-precision to single-precision floating-point, and places the two-way deinterleaved results in the double-width destination elements of the destination vectors.
This instruction follows SME2 floating-point numerical behaviors corresponding to instructions that place their results in one or more SVE Z vectors.
ID_AA64SMFR0_EL1.F16F16 indicates whether this instruction is implemented.

a.hover: For the "Two registers" variant: is the name of the first scalable vector register of the destination multi-vector group, encoded as "Zd" times 2.
For the "Consecutive" variant: is the name of the second scalable vector register of the destination multi-vector group, encoded as "Zd" times 2 plus 1.
Is the name of the source scalable vector register, encoded in the "Zn" field.

ps.name: A64.sme.mortlach_multi_sve_4.mortlach_multi2_wide_fp_cvrt.fcvtl_mz2_z_

intro.para: Is the name of the first scalable vector register of the destination multi-vector group, encoded as "Zd" times 2.
Is the name of the second scalable vector register of the destination multi-vector group, encoded as "Zd" times 2 plus 1.
Is the name of the source scalable vector register, encoded in the "Zn" field.

ps.name: A64.sme.mortlach_multi_sve_4.mortlach_multi2_wide_fp_cvrt.fcvtl_mz2_z_
